query: ("cool roof" OR "green roof" OR "living roof" OR "reflective roof" OR "white roof" OR "vegetated roof" OR "rooftop garden" OR "blue-green roof") AND (temperature OR "ambient temperature" OR "surface temperature" OR "urban heat island" OR microclimate OR "thermal comfort" OR "heat exposure") AND (mortality OR morbidity OR "health outcome" OR cardiovascular OR respiratory OR "heat stress" OR "heat-related illness") AND ("randomized controlled trial" OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment" OR "difference-in-differences" OR "instrumental variable" OR "regression discontinuity" OR "propensity score" OR matching OR "causal inference" OR intervention OR "treatment effect" OR counterfactual OR "identification strategy" OR "exogenous variation")
